title: The Account of [the Attack on I§fahan
description: According to Ya 'qub b. Ibrahim47 and 'Amr b. 'Ali48 -'Abd al[2641] Rahman b. Mahdi49-Hammad b. Salamah50-Abu 'Imran alJawni51-'Alqamah b. 'Abdallah al-Muzani52 -Ma'gil b. Yasar [al-Muzani]: 'Umar b. al-Khattab consulted al-Hurmuzan,53 asl. i i:g him what he thought; should be begin with Fars, Azerbaijan, or Isfahan? He replied: "Fars and Azerbaijan are the wings; Isfahan is the head. If you cut off one of the wings, the other one [can still] work. But, if you cut off the head, the wings collapse.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 14
